name: Corn, Black, Bean and Red Pepper Salad
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Black Beans, Can, rinsed, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cooked corn kernels, black beans (rinsed and drained), diced red pepper, olive oil, wine vinegar, cumin, salt, and pepper.
2. Mix well to ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Sprinkle the chopped coriander over the salad.
